label: Kathirmni Entry Cam
caption:
Scene: The scene is set in a spacious, modern retail store, likely a home appliance or electronics shop, characterized by polished marble flooring with large yellow and white circular patterns. In the foreground, a group of men is gathered around a white and red ice cream freezer branded with the name 'Arun'. One man wears a bright yellow polo shirt, another a brown shirt, and a third a striped white and grey shirt. They appear to be discussing the freezer's features or its contents. In the background, a woman in a black top and blue jeans walks across the store floor, while another woman in a patterned dress stands near a black counter area. The background is filled with retail displays, including black shelving units holding various boxed products and a wall of small, square display tiles. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a commercial interior. The camera maintains a high-angle, wide-shot perspective, capturing the interactions and movements of the people within the store.

Events:
<0.0 - 11.5> A man in a yellow shirt talks to a group.
<11.5 - 15.5> A woman in a black shirt walks across the floor.
<15.5 - 21.5> A man in a striped shirt walks toward the freezer.
<21.5 - 27.5> A man in a yellow shirt walks toward the freezer.
<27.5 - 34.5> A man in a yellow shirt gestures while talking.
<34.5 - 41.5> A man in a yellow shirt leans over the freezer.
<41.5 - 48.5> A man in a brown shirt walks toward the freezer.
<48.5 - 56.5> A man in a yellow shirt holds a red can.
<56.5 - 64.5> A man in a striped shirt walks toward the freezer.
<64.5 - 72.5> A man in a yellow shirt walks toward the freezer.
<72.5 - 81.5> A man in a yellow shirt leans over the freezer.
<81.5 - 91.5> A man in a yellow shirt stands up and gestures.
<91.5 - 108.5> A man in a yellow shirt leans over the freezer.
<108.5 - 122.0> A man in a striped shirt walks toward the freezer.
